executiveSummary: All 3 user stories and 7 functional requirements comply. Song title feature is fully wired: LLM generates it, OrchestrationResult validates it, backend propagates via X-Song-Title header, frontend stores/displays raw title and uses sanitized version for MP4 filename with timestamp fallback. Minor: utility function name differs from PRD spec (sanitizeFilename vs sanitizeTitle) — accepted as canonical.
minorObservations: FR-6 names the utility sanitizeTitle(title): string but implementation is sanitizeFilename(title): string | null in src/lib/sanitize-filename.ts. Name and return type accepted as canonical — more accurate than PRD suggestion.
US-002-AC05 (visual browser verification) cannot be confirmed via static code audit; requires manual QA.
Pre-existing: LTX2 video prompt bypass in video_service.py — video_prompt set to image_prompt with LTX2 call commented out. Unrelated to this iteration; logged as technical debt.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: Iteration is fully compliant. Actions taken: (1) sanitizeFilename accepted as canonical name — no rename. (2) Manual browser smoke test recommended for US-002-AC05. (3) LTX2 video prompt bypass logged to .agents/TECHNICAL_DEBT.md.
refactorPlan: No refactoring required. All implementations comply and no structural issues were identified. Iteration can be closed pending manual verification of US-002-AC05.
